title: campium lonchophorum
intro: Campium lonchophorum, also known as Indian valerian, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Valerianaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, providing relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Campium lonchophorum can be dried and used as a tea or tincture to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
